ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* Name of the city where the battle was fought */,
  "country" TEXT /* Name of the country where the battle was fought */,
  "region" TEXT /* Name of the region or province where the battle was fought */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  "population_1940" INTEGER /* Population of the city in 1940 */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "battles" (
  "battle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each battle */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the battle was fought */,
  "direction" INTEGER /* ID of the battle type (direction) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the battle was fought */,
  "survivors" INTEGER /* Number of survivors */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the battle started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the battle ended */,
  "commander_allied" TEXT /* Name of the allied commander */,
  "commander_axis" TEXT /* Name of the axis commander */,
  "allied_forces" INTEGER /* Number of allied forces */,
  "axis_forces" INTEGER /* Number of axis forces */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the battle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("battle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battles_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battles_direction FOREIGN KEY ("direction") REFERENCES battle_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battles_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "battle_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each battle type */,
  "direction" TEXT /* Direction of the battle */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the battle type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" INTEGER /* Year the battle was fought */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "casualties" (
  "casualty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each casualty record */,
  "battle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the battle during which the casualties occurred */,
  "killed" INTEGER /* Number of soldiers killed */,
  "wounded" INTEGER /* Number of soldiers wounded */,
  "missing" INTEGER /* Number of soldiers missing */,
  "captured" INTEGER /* Number of soldiers captured */,
  "deserted" INTEGER /* Number of soldiers who deserted */,
  "civilian_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of civilian deaths */,
  "civilian_injured" INTEGER /* Number of civilians injured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("casualty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_casualties_battle_id FOREIGN KEY ("battle_id") REFERENCES battles ("battle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "battle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the battle being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the battle data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the battle data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_battle_id FOREIGN KEY ("battle_id") REFERENCES battles ("battle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "battle_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "battle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the battle being versioned */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the changes made in the version */,
  "version_creator" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., Draft, Approved, Rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battle_versions_version_creator FOREIGN KEY ("version_creator") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battle_versions_battle_id FOREIGN KEY ("battle_id") REFERENCES battles ("battle_id")
)
